title: Garlic Knuckle Medley
description: A mediterranean-friendly meal-prep Japanese dish featuring a crispy pork knuckle with a garlicky glaze that's perfect for snacking or as a light dinner.

ingredients.name: Thyme sprigs
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried, optional for herbaceousness

instructions: Rinse the pork knuckle under cold water and pat dry with paper towels. Score the skin lightly with a sharp knife to enhance crispy texture.
Mix minced garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, and thyme together in a small bowl for the glaze. Brush evenly over both sides of the knuckle, ensuring it's well coated.

Place the pork knuckle on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil or parchment paper. Roast in preheated oven for about 1 hour per pound (about 45 minutes to 1 hour), turning halfway through cooking time.

For best results, remove from oven and let rest covered with aluminum foil for at least 5-10 minutes after removing from the oven to allow juices redistribute inside the meat. This step helps achieve a nice texture and flavor development.
Slice into bite-sized pieces and serve as a snack or meal-prepped dish.
